name: prediction-market
description: Prediction Market Platform - Clone previsao.io with crypto payments

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w apps/api & npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.clean: rimraf apps/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/node_modules packages/*/dist node_modules
